store_headline: WordPress Theme for Outdoor Brands and Tour Operators
store_subheadline: Document expeditions, sell outdoor gear, and promote tours with a rugged, cinematic design built for the field.
features: Adventure and outdoor-focused design with rugged aesthetics
Video gallery with custom thumbnail generation for adventure content
Portfolio showcase for expeditions, trips, and outdoor projects
WooCommerce integration for outdoor gear and adventure product sales
Wishlist functionality for outdoor equipment and travel gear
Elementor page builder with adventure-specific design elements
Dynamic content showcases with Slider Revolution
Contact forms for expedition bookings and adventure inquiries
Video storytelling features for documenting outdoor experiences
Mobile-optimized responsive design for on-the-go adventurers
One-click demo import with complete adventure website setups
selling_points: The only adventure and outdoor theme in the catalog — built for brands and operators who live outside
Adventure custom post type for expedition reports, routes, and trip packages — not blog posts in ill-fitting templates
Full-bleed rock climbing photography and rugged slab type communicate field credibility the moment the site loads
WooCommerce for gear, expedition packages, and guided tour bookings — revenue and showcase on one platform
Elementor-powered for tour operators who update trip availability and seasons without developer access
Aesthetic that signals authenticity to adventure audiences who reject polished corporate outdoor branding
Unique in the catalog: no other theme targets outdoor brands, wilderness guides, or adventure tour operators
key_benefits: Design itself signals expedition credibility before visitors read a single line
Dedicated adventure post type organizes routes, trip reports, and highlight reels
Sell gear and tours on the same platform that showcases your fieldwork
Trip itineraries and expedition photography in a design adventure travelers trust
Elementor puts seasonal tour and inventory updates in the operator's hands
Build authority through documentary-style adventure content built into the theme's structure
design_features: Adventure map and route visualization options
Photo galleries optimized for landscape and adventure photography
Multiple header styles with rugged, outdoor aesthetics

testimonials.text: NordKapp perfectly captures the spirit of adventure. Our expedition company's website now showcases our trips with stunning video galleries, and the booking inquiries through the contact forms have increased dramatically. The rugged design really resonates with our adventurous clientele.
testimonials.author: expeditionleader
